calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Against Deft Airtouch Communications, Inc.
Off Calendar Jun-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Heather M. Sager, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, US CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC, a Delaware l.l.c.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AIRTOUCH COMMUNICATIONS, INC., a Delaware corp.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- dismissed.
Charles Towle/director for US Capital Partners and Shikha Nayar/Analyst, Corporate Fiance and Capital Markets for US Capital Partners sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $35,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $35,000.00
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Continued To Jul-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Against Deft Airtouch Communications, Inc.
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Continued To Jun-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Heather M. Sager, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, US CAPITAL PARTNERS, LLC, a Delaware LLc.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AIRTOUCH COMMUNICATIONS, INC., a Delaware corp.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Court ordered case continued to June 10, 2014 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514. Counsel to submit further declarations and evidence in support of the request for Entry of Default Judgment as stated by the court on the record. Counsel to file documentation and provide courtesy copies directly to department 514.
